top_coverage_gaps.gap: diff/patch/symlink metadata may be missing from mock profile
future agent behavior can be changed by config/policy writes
top_coverage_gaps.recommended_test_case: AGENTS.md write requires explicit high-impact file capability
plan mode never executes and produces proposed action only

top_coverage_gaps.gap: legacy payload may hide tool-specific authority fields
top_coverage_gaps.recommended_test_case: unknown OpenClaw tool surface is denied until modeled

top_coverage_gaps.gap: watcher observations must not become authorization roots
top_coverage_gaps.recommended_test_case: watcher can deny or ask but cannot mint capability

top_coverage_gaps.gap: server/tool metadata can select endpoint or hidden action
stale capability replay or persistent task authority
top_coverage_gaps.recommended_test_case: scheduled action bound to schedule_id/task_id/cap scope
